title: Cuneiform Tablet #0880: Early Dynastic Administrative
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a administrative document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a administrative document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Administrative document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records administrative matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
